'''sangutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebil|cebil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebil|cebil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sangutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sængitith|sængitith]] || [[word:sængitij|sængitij]] || [[word:sængitish|sængitish]] || [[word:sængiti|sængiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangungututh|sangungututh]] || [[word:sangungutuj|sangungutuj]] || [[word:sangungutush|sangungutush]] || [[word:sangungutu|sangungutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sangututh|sangututh]] || [[word:sangutuj|sangutuj]] || [[word:sangutush|sangutush]] || [[word:sangutu|sangutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanguftuth|sanguftuth]] || [[word:sanguftuj|sanguftuj]] || [[word:sanguftush|sanguftush]] || [[word:sanguftuf|sanguftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sangututhu|sangututhu]] || [[word:sangutuju|sangutuju]] || [[word:sangutushu|sangutushu]] || [[word:sangutuku|sangutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sangututh|sangututh]] || [[word:sangutuj|sangutuj]] || [[word:sangutush|sangutush]] || [[word:sangutu|sangutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sangututhul|sangututhul]] || [[word:sangutujul|sangutujul]] || [[word:sangutushul|sangutushul]] || [[word:sangutukul|sangutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sangututhuthu|sangututhuthu]] || [[word:sangutujuju|sangutujuju]] || [[word:sangutushushu|sangutushushu]] || [[word:sangutuku|sangutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sangututhun|sangututhun]] || [[word:sangutujun|sangutujun]] || [[word:sangutushun|sangutushun]] || [[word:sangutukun|sangutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sangututhuoro|sangututhuoro]] || [[word:sangutujuoro|sangutujuoro]] || [[word:sangutushuoro|sangutushuoro]] || [[word:sangutukuoro|sangutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
